name: Pupupu
short_description: Collect mushrooms. Turn small mushrooms into big mushrooms. Be happy.
detailed_description:
Pupupu is a relaxing casual puzzle game about collecting mushrooms and filling the basket. Nothing more, nothing less. Take a break from the complications of your everyday life and just collect some mushrooms. There is no plot, no challenges, no DLC or paid content, no RPG elements or leaderboards. Just mushrooms.

This game was made for my girlfriend so she could feel less anxious and have a little bit of fun. Play it yourself, or give it to any sad overwhelmed person in your vicinity. And take care.
